content: Resident: Have you noticed how the Commonwealth has changed lately? It seems like everywhere I look, there's another bordello or porno mag.

Hawthorne: It's a sign of the times, I suppose. In a world like this, people are looking for any kind of escape or pleasure they can find.  Still, it's not all bad. There's plenty of honest work to be found if you know where to look. Like I always say, the Commonwealth provides.
